title: Hifz Department Admission Open
short: Applications are open for the 2026 Hifz intake. Submission deadline is 30 April.
full: Applications are open for the 2026 Hifz intake. Forms can be collected from the admin office between 9:00 AM and 2:00 PM. Submission deadline is 30 April.

title: Mid-Term Examination Schedule Published
short: Class-wise examination routines are now available in the portal and notice board.
full: Class-wise examination routines are now available in the portal and notice board. Students must bring admit cards and arrive at least 30 minutes before exam start time.

title: Monthly Parent-Teacher Meeting
short: Guardian meeting will be held this Friday after Jumuah prayer in the main hall.
full: Guardian meeting will be held this Friday after Jumuah prayer in the main hall. Guardians are requested to meet class teachers and discuss student progress and attendance.

title: Ramadan Food Support Program
short: Student volunteers have started community iftar support for nearby families.
full: Student volunteers have started community iftar support for nearby families. Donations in cash or food packages can be submitted at the madrasa office counter.
